name: Glade Render Ribbons
code: var c=drawingContext,w=dimensionContext.width,a=state.ribbons||[];for(var i=0;i<a.length;i++){var r=a[i];c.beginPath();for(var x=0;x<=w;x+=8){var y=r.y+Math.sin(x*r.f+r.ph+(state.t||0)*0.02)*r.amp; if(x===0)c.moveTo(x,y); else c.lineTo(x,y);}c.strokeStyle='hsla('+r.h+',85%,60%,0.22)';c.lineWidth=r.th;c.stroke();}
